title: HexMapping
body:
**HexMapping** is a [Hexcasting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) addon that allows casters to put markers on various web map mods/plugins by adding two new iotas (Map and Marker) and various new patterns

**List of Integrated Map Mods:**
- [Bluemap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bluemap)
- [Dynmap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/dynmap)
- [Pl3xmap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/pl3xmap)
- [Squaremap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/squaremap)

**List of Available Markers:**
- Circle Marker
- Rectangle Marker
- Polygon Marker
- Polyline Marker
- Icon Marker

There is also interop with [Hexical](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexical) for its Mesh Entity and Dye Iota
